personal.name: Banty Agarwal
personal.title: Senior Software Engineer
personal.tagline: I build enterprise-grade systems that perform — 200% faster scripts, 20% leaner APIs, zero-compromise code.

about.bio: Senior Software Engineer with 4+ years across the full SDLC. Specialising in .NET 8, C#, ASP.NET Core, Angular, and Azure — with a proven track record in Microservices, performance optimisation, and clean architecture.

achievements: Refactored image processing & barcode scanning via GDPicture SDK — 200% script execution improvement over legacy.
Architected .NET 8 enterprise document processing: batch creation, document separation, PDF merging.
Delivered ASP.NET Core RESTful APIs for Kofax modules — 30% reduction in manual workflow intervention.
Mentored 3 junior devs; code review standards cut production bugs by 15%.
Optimised SQL queries, Joins and CTEs to enforce data integrity across pipelines.
Built Microservices architecture (.NET 7 + SQL Server) with 15+ REST APIs including payment gateway — supported 25% traffic increase.
Deployed STEM on Azure App Services — 15% infrastructure latency reduction.
Engineered Wauly ad-tech modules (ASP.NET Zero): device management + content display APIs.
Integrated Google Sign-In API + CORS policies for secure authentication.
Angular + Bootstrap responsive UI; 85% xUnit code coverage.

keyProjects: TOD PH — Talent on Demand Pre-Hire
achievements: Improved API response times by 20% with optimised LINQ queries on onboarding portal.
Built Angular 14 data collection forms with secure POST API integration.
Created Stored Procedures, Views, CTEs in SQL Server for complex reporting.
Azure Application Insights logging accelerated troubleshooting by 25%.
xUnit tests covering critical candidate data validation edge cases.

projects.title: Enterprise Document Processing Platform
projects.shortDescription: High-performance document automation with 200% speed uplift — PDF merging, barcode scanning, batch processing.
projects.fullDescription: Architected and delivered a full enterprise document processing solution at Coforge. Refactored image processing and barcode scanning via GDPicture SDK for a 200% performance gain. Built ASP.NET Core APIs for Kofax integration cutting manual intervention by 30%. Enforced data integrity with server-side exception handling and optimised SQL pipelines.
highlights: 15% fewer production bugs via code review

projects.title: STEM E-Commerce Platform
projects.shortDescription: Microservices e-commerce: 15+ REST APIs, payment gateway, Azure deployment, 85% test coverage.
projects.fullDescription: Led full-stack development of the STEM e-commerce platform. Built modular Microservices with .NET 7 — 15+ REST APIs covering cart, catalogue, and payment. Angular + Bootstrap frontend. Azure App Services deployment achieved 15% latency reduction while handling a 25% traffic surge.

projects.title: TOD PH — Pre-Hire Onboarding Portal
projects.shortDescription: Enterprise HR portal — 20% faster APIs, real-time Azure monitoring, secure candidate data forms.
projects.fullDescription: Developed and optimised the TOD PH pre-hire portal at Globant. Improved API response by 20% via LINQ query optimisation. Built Angular 14 responsive forms for candidate data. Maintained complex SQL Server Stored Procedures and CTEs. Azure Application Insights cut troubleshooting time by 25%.

projects.title: Wauly — Digital Ad Tech Platform
projects.shortDescription: Digital advertising platform — device management, content display APIs, Google Sign-In auth.
projects.fullDescription: Built custom modules for Wauly using ASP.NET Zero Boilerplate. REST APIs for device management and dynamic content display. Google Sign-In + CORS for secure auth. Responsive Angular admin dashboard for campaign management.

certifications.title: RESTful Web API – The Complete Guide
